summary: Bot order management project with pending order consultation method replacing incorrect API calls.

new_feature_requests.summary: Implement pending method to consult open bot orders, replacing any incorrect API calls

Add a `pending` query method to the backend actor that returns the currently open orders placed by the bot. This method should replace any incorrect or placeholder calls previously used to retrieve open orders, and must return the same order data shape already used in the codebase (side, price, quantity, order ID).

Update the frontend `useQueries.ts` open orders hook to call the backend `pending` method instead of any previously incorrect call. Ensure the OpenOrdersPanel continues to display the fetched orders correctly.
